"'''''Star Wars: New Jedi Order'' Round-Robin Interview'''" is a round-table discussion that was included as an extra in ''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'', the last volume of ''[[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order]]''. The [[Del Rey]]–moderated conversation featured [[Lucy Autrey Wilson|Lucy Wilson]], [[Shelly Shapiro]], [[Sue Rostoni]], and [[James Luceno]], and it focused on the conception and history of the ''New Jedi Order'' series.
